was formally charged with 14 felony
counts, including seven counts of abuse
of a child not resulting in death or
great bodily harm, and seven counts of
conspiracy to commit abuse of a child.
He was later released under pre-trial
supervision. A pre-trial conference is
scheduled for September 15th with a jury
trial set for September 22nd, 2025. In
March 2025, George's maternal
grandmother filed for custody and was
granted temporary guardianship with a
final court hearing set for July 28th to
decide if it will be made permanent. If
you'd like to see select new videos
